heading: Import restrictions
label: 2606 Import restrictions
notes: Effective DateSection effective on the 90th day after , or on any date which the President shall prescribe and publish in the Federal Register, with exceptions, see , set out as a note under .Jan. 12, 1983section 315 of Pub. L. 97–446section 2601 of this title
Delegation of FunctionsFor delegation of certain functions of President under this section, see Ex. Ord. No. 12555, , 51 F.R. 8475, set out as a note under .Mar. 10, 1986section 2602 of this title

children.heading: Documentation of lawful exportation
children.label: a Documentation of lawful exportation
children.text: No designated archaeological or ethnological material that is exported (whether or not such exportation is to the United States) from the State Party after the designation of such material under may be imported into the United States unless the State Party issues a certification or other documentation which certifies that such exportation was not in violation of the laws of the State Party.section 2604 of this title

children.heading: Customs action in absence of documentation
children.label: b Customs action in absence of documentation

children.text: the certificate or other documentation of the State Party required under subsection (a); or

children.label: A
children.text: not less than ten years before the date of such entry and that neither the person for whose account the material is imported (or any related person) contracted for or acquired an interest, directly or indirectly, in such material more than one year before that date of entry, or

children.label: B
children.text: on or before the date on which such material was designated under ,section 2604 of this title

children.label: i
children.text: the material was exported from the State Party not less than ten years before the date of entry into the United States, and

children.label: ii
children.text: neither such importer or person (or any related person) contracted for or acquired an interest, directly or indirectly, in such material more than one year before the date of entry of the material; and

children.label: B
children.text: a statement provided by the consignor, or person who sold the material to the importer, which states the date, or, if not known, his belief, that the material was exported from the State Party not less than ten years before the date of entry into the United States, and the reasons on which the statement is based; and

children.label: A
children.text: one or more declarations under oath by the importer or the person for whose account the material is to be imported, stating that, to the best of his knowledge, the material was exported from the State Party on or before the date such material was designated under , andsection 2604 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: a statement by the consignor or person who sold the material to the importer which states the date, or if not known, his belief, that the material was exported from the State Party on or before the date such material was designated under , and the reasons on which the statement is based.section 2604 of this title

is a member of the same family as the importer or person of account, including, but not limited to, membership as a brother or sister (whether by whole or half blood), spouse, ancestor, or lineal descendant;
is a partner or associate with the importer or person of account in any partnership, association, or other venture; or

is a corporation or other legal entity in which the importer or person of account directly or indirectly owns, controls, or holds power to vote 20 percent or more of the outstanding voting stock or shares in the entity.
